nasb.text: After the deportation to Babylon: Jeconiah became the father of Shealtiel, and Shealtiel the father of Zerubbabel.

esv.text: And after the deportation to Babylon: Jechoniah was the father of Shealtiel, and Shealtiel the father of Zerubbabel,

cnv.text: 被擄到巴比倫以後，耶哥尼雅生撒拉鐵，撒拉鐵生所羅巴伯，

ccb.text: 被掳到巴比伦以后， 耶哥尼雅生撒拉铁， 撒拉铁生所罗巴伯，

csbs.text: 被迫迁徙巴比伦以后， 耶哥尼雅生撒拉铁， 撒拉铁生所罗巴伯，
